description:
# Kaggle Competition: Titanic - Machine Learning from Disaster

Start here! Predict survival on the Titanic and get familiar with ML basics

- **Evaluation Metric**: Categorization Accuracy
- **Dataset Files** (at /workspace/data/): gender_submission.csv, test.csv, train.csv
- **Submission**: save to /workspace/output/submission.csv

children.description: Perform Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) and initial data cleaning. Identify missing values in 'Age', 'Cabin', and 'Embarked', and decide on imputation or removal strategies. Output a summary of data quality and basic correlations.

Perform feature engineering and preprocessing. This includes extracting 'Title' from names, creating 'FamilySize' from 'SibSp' and 'Parch', encoding categorical variables (Sex, Embarked, Title), and scaling numerical features. Output the processed training and test feature matrices.

Train and evaluate multiple machine learning models (e.g., Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, SVM) using cross-validation on the training set. Select the best performing model based on categorization accuracy and output its performance metrics.
Train and evaluate a Random Forest classifier using cross-validation on the preprocessed training data. Output the mean accuracy and standard deviation.

Train and evaluate a Gradient Boosting classifier (e.g., XGBoost, LightGBM, or HistGradientBoosting) using cross-validation on the preprocessed training data. Output the mean accuracy and standard deviation.

Train and evaluate a Support Vector Machine (SVM) classifier using cross-validation on the preprocessed training data (ensure feature scaling is applied if not already handled). Output the mean accuracy and standard deviation.
Compare the cross-validation performance of all evaluated models, identify the best performing model based on accuracy, and output a summary of the model selection process.
Generate predictions on the test dataset using the optimized model from Task 3 and save the final results to /workspace/output/submission.csv in the required format.
